reviews.comment:
La semana pasada fui a cargar y me atendió un pibe alto que se llamaba Pablo, la verdad una atención excelente!!! Ojalá le lleguen estás felicitaciones, en pocas palabras un crack!

(Translated by Google)
Last week I went to top up my phone and a tall guy named Pablo helped me. Honestly, the service was excellent! I hope he gets these compliments; in short, he's a star!

reviews.comment:
Me negaron la compra que queria realizar alegando que no existía la promoción cuando la misma está descripta en la app y me terminaron cobrando cualquier precio. Publicidad engañosa y pésima capacitacion del personal. Un cliente menos

(Translated by Google)
They refused my purchase, claiming the promotion didn't exist, even though it was clearly described in the app, and ended up charging me the full price. Misleading advertising and terrible staff training. One less customer.
